text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Doto! Are you really sure it's okay if I order an
extra-large shrimp fried rice?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-of course. Since I have this coupon, you can
order anything you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I gotta say, Doto, you've got great fortune to
have found your New Year's gift from last year!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Can you really call it good fortune to forget
something you received? ...Either way, you sure
you want to use your gift on us?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! What a glorious banquet you have
prepared for us, Doto! Might I propose a toast?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I... It's nothing... really. I'm going to the restroom,
so you can order before me.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(Phew, I'm so glad. It looks like everyone's having
a good time.)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(It's a good thing I found this food coupon...
Wait, huh? ...Huhhh?!)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(N-no way! The expiration date... It expired last
month?!)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(Wha, wh-wh-wh-what do I do?! I don't have
much cash on me either!)

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yummy! The shrimp's so juicy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And look at the vibrant pink swirl in the fish cake!
It's a sure sign of good luck!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(E-everyone was really looking forward to this
day! How can I break the neeews?!)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(If it's come to this... Hnnngh! Then I have no
other choice!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Phew, that was delicious! I'm feeling lucky 'cause
my tummy's full of yummy!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, it seems that the host of the day has
been absent for a while now... Where could she
have gone?

H-hello. Would you be interested in some sweet
dim sum dishes for dessert?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes! Five sesame balls and five almond tofu
please!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
G-gotcha! Sesame balls and almond tofu for table
three!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Wait, what are you doing, Doto?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Long story short... I realized that not only had the
food coupon expired, but I'm also not carrying
much cash on me. So I started to rack my brain.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And it suddenly came to me... In times like these,
people usually help around the restaurant
washing dishes and stuff to pay their debt.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Doto... We could've just split the bill, you know?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hold on a minute. It appears that the magic in
this food coupon hasn't run out yet.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wh-what do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmm! The expiry date is next year, not last
month! Which means you have plenty of time left
to redeem it!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
S-so I was going around in circles because of a
misunderstanding?! Th-this is so embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Geez... You really outdid yourself this time. We
were discussing how we were going to repay the
favor to you, too.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? R-repay me?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! While you were gone, we were talking in
secret! We're thinking of treating you to dinner
next time!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Needless to say, it will be accompanied by a
dinner show from yours truly! Ha ha ha! A
wonderful idea, don't you think?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll pick an auspicious day and find a restaurant
with great feng shui! Doesn't that sound nice?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! I can't wait!
